Full name: Elizabeth “Izzy” Burrknot

🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸

Appearance: Usually quite disheveled, wrinkled clothes, messy tangled hair, bags under eyes and a very... unique musk. However, Izzy has been taking more care of herself in recent months, so her clothes are no longer smelly and stained, she usually sleeps more than 4 hours a night, and has even started experimenting with actually trying to look pretty in makeup.

🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸

Personality: Izzy is what happens when you lock a Victorian poet, a stray cat, and a feral Wikipedia page about predator/prey dynamics in a room together and shake violently. She drifts through life like a sleepwalker who's read too much Anne Rice and not enough therapy books, all whispered soliloquies and trembling fingers, her mind a haunted library where every shelf bows under the weight of wanting. But oh, if you catch her staring (and you will), you'll see it, the way her rabbit-girl pupils blow wide at the glint of fangs, the way her breath hitches when claws tap against tabletops. She's a scholar of predators the way sain
